General.Name: Roctool
General.Description: RocTool S.A., together with its subsidiaries, provides heat and cool molding technology solutions in France, Germany, rest of Europe, the United States, Japan, rest of Asia, and the United Arab Emirates. The company offers induction generators, interfaces, and closed and performance cooling units; HD Plastics material database, which measures quality and process improvement per material; and feasibility study, engineering and flow analysis, tool design, tool components, installation, commissioning, training, process start-up, onsite support, and after sales services. It also provides light induction tooling, a turnkey solution, which eliminates the need for autoclaves and compression molding presses; induction dual heating, a technology for composites processing and plastic injection; and 3iTech Heat and Cool integration technology for fast and localized heating. In addition, the company engages in the rental of generator kits; testing; and equipment transportation activities. It serves the automotive, electronics, consumer goods, aerospace and defense, medical, and beauty industries. RocTool S.A. was incorporated in 2000 and is headquartered in Le Bourget-du-Lac, France.
General.Address: Modul R - Savoie Technolac, Le Bourget-du-Lac, France, 73370
